signals.headline: # CEASEFIRE BETWEEN US AND IRAN AGREED | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
# CEASEFIRE BETWEEN US AND IRAN AGREED | YES | HIGH confidence

The **United States and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire on April 8, 2026**, mediated by Pakistan.[1] Trump announced the agreement on Truth Social, and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi confirmed Iran's acceptance the same day.[1]

Key developments affecting prediction markets:
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A
US x Iran diplomatic meeting by April 18, 2026?

signals.headline: **The ceasefire has already been violated by both sides** since its declaration[1]
signals.raw: **The ceasefire has already been violated by both sides** since its declaration[1]

signals.headline: Russia welcomed the ceasefire and called for de-escalation and diplomatic solutions[2]
signals.raw:
Russia welcomed the ceasefire and called for de-escalation and diplomatic solutions[2]

The fragility of the ceasefire—with violations already occurring and stalled negotiations by mid-April—suggests significant uncertainty about whether this agreement will hold or expand into a lasting resolution.
